productDisplayName: Nike Men Nike Lunarfly+  2 Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: The nike LunarFly+2 running shoe offers absolute cushioned comfort, better Fit and dynamic support. Perfect for underpronators and moderate overpronators, the Dynamic Support platform in the midsole adapts to the runner's varying stride and offers on-demand support. Featuring a nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, Stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime. Upper Breathable mesh upper with nearly seamless construction for ample ventilation and reduced irritation Inner bootie that wraps around the foot offering exceptional comfort Extended Flywire panels for lightweight comfort, super strong support and more secure fit around the midfoot and heel Symmetrical lace-up system for a snug fit Meshed and padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfort Reflective elements for enhanced visibility in low light conditions Midsole Low profile midsole made of Lunarlon cushioning for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorption Dynamic Support System to adapt to your stride Padded footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Rubber outsole for enhanced durability Waffle pattern for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioning Flex grooves for ease of movement Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
